history.content: Hey Raul — doing great. Ready whenever you are ⚡
stop. calling. tools. every. run. why are you doing that - is codex incapable of being conversational or soemthing

You’re right — that “Done.” was unclear and annoying.

I meant: **I understand, and I’ll stop using tools for normal chat.**  
Then I immediately did it again, which is on me. My bad.

Short conversational messages from you = direct replies, no tool calls.
